title: The Impossible is Self imposed Peace Through Development is the Only Way Forward in
description:
The presentation is giving by Hussein Askary, Southwest Asia Coordinator for the Schiller Institute. Mr. Askary is co-author of “Extending the New Silk Road to Southwest Asia and Africa,” and Arabic translator of “The New Silk Road Becomes the World Land-Bridge.”

#larouche #Israel #Palestine #War #peace #oasisplan

Hussein Askary discussed the Oasis Plan, especially challenging the axioms behind the zero-growth movement and its political expression, explaining key principles of development based on the image of creative humanity based on transforming nature. He used examples from his recent trip to Xinjiang to show the Chinese development policy to green the desert. The discussion included whether there are too many people, and what to do about the terrorism in West Africa.
